tasks.label: Auto Git Push
tasks.command: git add .; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -gt 1) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 1) { git commit -m 'Automated update'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; git push -u origin main
